title: Neocheiropteris sarawakensis
taxonomy: Neocheiropteris sarawakensis is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Neocheiropteris and the phylum Pteridophyta. The species is native to Malaysia and is found in Sarawak. The classification of Neocheiropteris sarawakensis is further categorized as a member of the kingdom Plantae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other fern species.

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, where its extracts have been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress.
